{
  "claims": [
    "California experienced the most devastating wildfire in state history in October 2017, claiming 44 lives and causing over 9 billion dollars in insurable damage.",
    "More than 14,700 homes and 728 businesses were damaged or destroyed during the October 2017 wildfires in California.",
    "The rebuild timelines for Northern California fires of 2017 are expected to be time-consuming due to the magnitude of loss experienced.",
    "The size and scope of wildland fire events have grown significantly over the last decade in California.",
    "AB 1772 extends the time a home or business owner has to rebuild an insured property from 2 to 3 years after a declared emergency."
  ]
}
